Operation 'getDeviceData' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description lacks clarity on input parameters (date range filtering, limit parameter) and authentication requirements. Enhanced description specifies the MAC address parameter requirement, optional filtering capabilities, the maximum result limit, the response schema type (WeatherData array), sort order, and authentication requirements. This enables AI agents to understand what parameters to provide and how to construct effective queries for historical weather data retrieval.

data.current_description: Fetch historical data for a specific device by MAC address. Returns up to 288 results per request. Data is sorted by date descending.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve historical weather observations for a specific device identified by MAC address. Accepts optional parameters to filter by date range and limit results (maximum 288 per request). Returns an array of WeatherData objects sorted by timestamp in descending order. Requires both application key and API key for authentication.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity on input parameters (date range filtering, limit parameter) and authentication requirements. Enhanced description specifies the MAC address parameter requirement, optional filtering capabilities, the maximum result limit, the response schema type (WeatherData array), sort order, and authentication requirements. This enables AI agents to understand what parameters to provide and how to construct effective queries for historical weather data retrieval.
